sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n115826" key="yugmokata/rrous" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ψυγμοκατάρρους</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n115826.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">chill, catarrh,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cyran.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">60</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
